case_title: MARGARET CHOY VS. JACK SHAFER et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAFER, JACK
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE FOR CASES REPORTED BY A COURT EMPLOYED REPORTER ONLY, PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFER, JACK
ORDER AUTHORIZING DISCOVERY BY MENTAL EXAMINATION

DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF MARGARET CHOY'S MOTION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING PHYSICAL OR MENTAL EXAMINATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR A MENTAL EXAMINATION ON A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE DATE ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 24, 2010 PURSUANT TO THE PROPOSED ORDER, EXCEPT THAT THE COURT WILL DELETE THE PROVISION FOR "ANY ADDITIONAL TESTING." NO SANCTIONS IS AWARDED BY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOY, MARGARET
REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT JACK SHAFER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOY, MARGARET
DECLARATION OF MARGARET CHOY IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT JACK SHAFER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOY, MARGARET

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JACK SHAFER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PROVEN A REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL RELOCATION EXPENSES UNDER SECTION 37.9 C(E)(2) AS OPPOSED TO EXCEPTION 37.9(1). DEFENDANT SHAFER HAS FAILED TO MAKE A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING THAT HE MADE A PRIOR CLAIM OF ENTITLEMENT TO SAID EXPENSES AND THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WAIVER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR # 5153 301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Margaret Choy, is present.
Attorney, Robert Sellards, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jack Shafer, is present.
Attorney, Mary Wiederhold , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-10-2010 remains on calendar.

MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of DEC-13-2010 remains on calendar.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT M. SELLARDS OF STUHR & MILLER, TEL. NO. 585-2122 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARY CATHERINE WIEDERHOLD, TEL. NO. 533-0735 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JACK SHAFER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PROVEN A REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL RELOCATION EXPENSES UNDER SECTION 37.9 C(E)(2) AS OPPOSED TO EXCEPTION 37.9(1). DEFENDANT SHAFER HAS FAILED TO MAKE A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING THAT HE MADE A PRIOR CLAIM OF ENTITLEMENT TO SAID EXPENSES AND THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WAIVER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Physical Or Mental Examination
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT M. SELLARD, TEL. NO. 585-2122 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WILLIAM SHAPIRO, TEL. NO. 678-9209 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF MARGARET CHOY'S Motion For Order Authorizing Physical Or Mental Examination
IS GRANTED. Defendant is ordered to appear for a mental examination on a mutually agreeable date on or before November 24, 2010 pursuant to the proposed order, except that the court will delete the provision for "any additional testing." No sanctions is awarded by the court. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
